name: bugzilla
description: Codex plugin for searching and managing Bugzilla through REST or JSON-RPC with an OpenProject bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Search Bugzilla and move approved bugs into OpenProject.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Bugzilla using REST when available or JSON-RPC for older Bugzilla installations such as 5.0.2. Read operations work directly, while writes require explicit confirmation. Selected bugs can be previewed and created as OpenProject work packages.
defaultPrompt: Show me the latest open Bugzilla bugs.
Find Bugzilla bugs for the medics product.
Preview creating this Bugzilla bug in OpenProject.
